title: QuestionTrace Research Roadmap
summary: Operator-approved five-phase implementation roadmap for the QuestionTrace research fork; Phase 0 complete 2026-07-09; the coarse phase breakdown is to be adopted verbatim, not refined.
scope: storage rename (IDB and localStorage keys, no migration)
content pool pipeline and frozen pool export (data/content_pool_v1)
feed card, post detail, suggested questions, post-scoped Ask
global content graph and personal graph-memory
control and experimental recommendation rankers with strategies and diversity reranking
study onboarding, condition assignment, logging export, oral-test support
